creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
With GNATS, when a PR was sent to a mailing list, the From: field was
set to the submitter's address.

Now, with Bugzilla, it is always set to bz-noreply@freebsd.org.

When you read a mailing list like freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org, every line
seems a duplicate, and it's less readable.

Would it be possible to set the From: field back to the submitter's
address?
